title: Rurix Compute Sanitizer 证据 JSON(M5.4 G-M5-4)
description: compute-sanitizer racecheck/memcheck 对 kernel --smoke 真跑的正确性维度报告。clean=true 计入 m5.counter.compute_sanitizer_clean(ci/budget_eval.py)。非性能证据:不含锁频/采样字段(Sanitizer 严禁用于 measured 基准,M5_PLAN §5)。

kernel.description: 被检 kernel 干名(reduce/scan/transpose/gemm_tile/saxpy),或红绿夹具 fixture-race/fixture-clean

clean.description: true = 退出码 0 且无 error/hazard(计入 compute_sanitizer_clean)

report_summary.description: sanitizer 报告摘要(SUMMARY/hazard/error 行截取)
